title: Fixing Internet Problems
drDigitalIntro:
Internet not working? Start with the basics.
• Check if WiFi is turned on — look for the WiFi icon in your menu bar or taskbar.
• Turn WiFi off and back on to refresh the connection.
• If that doesn't work, try forgetting the network and reconnecting.
• Still stuck? Restart your router by unplugging it for 30 seconds.

playgroundTask.scenario: No internet connection — WiFi is off

steps.say: No internet! Click the WiFi icon in the menu bar to check your connection.
WiFi is turned off. Toggle it on.
WiFi is on but not connected. Click 'Join' next to CoolKids Network.

drDigitalSuccess: You fixed the WiFi! Toggling WiFi off and on refreshes the connection — it's the first thing to try when the internet stops working.
drDigitalHint: Click the WiFi icon in the menu bar, toggle WiFi on, then join your network.
